title: [codereview] BLE transport: unprotected config.require_secure access in nus_rx_cb before lock
description: nus_rx_cb reads transport_state.config.require_secure without holding lock or checking initialized flag. This can race with lichen_ble_transport_deinit() which clears initialized after stop(). Potential use of stale or NULL cb pointers or freed user_ctx. P2 security/race. Fix by moving check inside locked section or using snapshot. Tagged codereview per workflow.
